stories.title: AUD: RBA hike backs bullish outlook – BNY
stories.summary: BNY’s Head of Markets Macro Strategy Bob Savage notes that Australian data and policy are central for the Australian Dollar (AUD), with February CPI seen as critical to validate current rate-hike pricing and a constructive AUD view.

stories.title: Canadian Dollar outperforms major peers amid surging oil prices
stories.summary: The Canadian Dollar (CAD) trades higher against its major currency peers, but is marginally down to near 1.3735 against the US Dollar (USD) during the European trading session on Monday.

stories.title: US Dollar Index advances to near 100.00 due to strengthening Fed hawkish stance
stories.summary: The US Dollar Index (DXY), which measures the value of the US Dollar (USD) against six major currencies, extends its gains for the second successive session and is trading around 99.80 during the early European hours on Monday.

stories.title: Forex Today: Middle East crisis deepens, Gold plunges to fresh 2026-low
stories.summary: Here is what you need to know on Monday, March 23:

stories.title: EUR: Supported by hike speculation and PMIs – Danske Bank
stories.summary: Danske Research Team points out that the Euro was the second-best performing G10 currency last week after the Norwegian Krone (NOK), despite elevated energy prices.

stories.title: Gold adds to heavy intraday losses, hits fresh YTD low as bears target 200-day SMA support
stories.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) adds to its recent steep decline witnessed over the past three weeks or so and attracts heavy follow-through selling for the fourth consecutive day on Monday.

stories.title: Oil: Escalation risks keep supply anxiety elevated – Rabobank
stories.summary: Rabobank’s Senior Market Strategist Benjamin Picton highlights that the Iran war and threats around the Strait of Hormuz are sustaining significant risk for Oil markets.

stories.title: USD/INR jumps to record highs near 94.40 following Trump’s 48-hour ultimatum
stories.summary: The Indian Rupee (INR) extends its downfall against the US Dollar (USD) at the start of the holiday-shortened week. Indian markets will remain closed on Thursday due to Shri Ram Navami.

stories.title: WTI climbs above $99.00 as Middle East tensions escalate, Trump threatens Iran over Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: West Texas Intermediate (WTI), the US crude oil benchmark, is trading around $99.10 during the early European trading hours on Monday. The WTI price jumps amid an escalating conflict in the Middle East.

stories.title: USD/JPY Price Forecast: Approaches 160.00 as US Dollar gains amid Middle East war
stories.summary: The USD/JPY pair trades 0.22% higher to near 159.60 during the European trading session on Monday. The pair gains as the US Dollar (USD) trades firmly amid firm demand for safe-haven assets, in the wake of the war in the Middle East.

stories.title: Euro: PMIs to show how Oil shock is affecting prices – Societe Generale
stories.summary: Societe Generale’s macro team highlights that March flash PMIs will be the first key read on how the recent Oil shock is affecting Euro area activity and prices.

stories.title: EUR/USD: Volatility signals questioned after energy shock – Commerzbank
stories.summary: Commerzbank’s Thu Lan Nguyen argues that despite what is described as the greatest threat to energy security in history, implied EUR/USD volatility remains unusually low.

stories.title: Pound Sterling weakens as Middle East tensions drive oil surge and USD safe-haven demand
stories.summary: The GBP/USD pair attracts some sellers to around 1.3315 during the early European session on Monday, dragged by a firmer US Dollar (USD). The preliminary readings of Purchasing Managers Index (PMI) from the United Kingdom (UK) and the United States (US) will be released later on

stories.title: Australian Dollar faces heat from Iran conflicts-led risk-off mood
stories.summary: The Australian Dollar underperforms its major currency peers, is down 0.7% to near 0.6970 against the US Dollar (USD) in the early European trade on Monday.

stories.title: EUR/GBP steadies near 0.8650 as traders adopt caution on Middle East conflict
stories.summary: EUR/GBP pares its daily losses and is hovering around 0.8670 during the Asian hours on Monday. The currency cross opened at a gap down as the Euro (EUR) faces struggles amid increased safe-haven demand due to increasing Middle East tensions.

stories.title: EUR/USD falls to near 1.1540 as US Dollar remains firm amid Middle East conflicts
stories.summary: The EUR/USD pair is down 0.2% to near 1.1545 during the late Asian trading session on Monday. The major currency pair is under pressure as the US Dollar (USD) gains amid an increase in demand for safe-haven assets due to escalating conflicts in the Middle East.

stories.title: USD/CHF gathers strength to near 0.7990 on Fed hawkish tone
stories.summary: The USD/CHF pair gathers strength to near 0.7890 during the early European session on Monday. A hawkish hold from the US Federal Reserve (Fed) provides some support to the US Dollar (USD) against the Swiss Franc (CHF). Traders will closely monitor the situation in the Middle East

stories.title: GBP/JPY struggles to capitalize on modest intraday uptick, flat lines below mid-212.00s
stories.summary: The GBP/JPY cross attracts some dip-buyers near the 211.85 region during the Asian session on Monday, though it lacks follow-through and remains confined in a range held over the past week or so.

stories.title: India Gold price today: Gold falls, according to FXStreet data
stories.summary: Gold prices fell in India on Monday, according to data compiled by FXStreet.

stories.title: Silver Price Forecast: XAG/USD holds losses near $65.50 amid Fed hawkish outlook
stories.summary: Silver price (XAG/USD) extends its losing streak for the fifth successive session, trading around $65.60 per troy ounce during the Asian hours on Monday.

stories.title: Bithumb seeks to reappoint CEO despite recent controversies: Report
stories.summary: Bithumb was reportedly given a six-month partial suspension by South Korea’s Financial Intelligence Unit for alleged anti-money laundering failures.

stories.title: Global turmoil pushes uptake of decentralized messengers, social media
stories.summary: Bitchat saw a spike in downloads during protests in Madagascar, Nepal, Indonesia and Iran over the last year, and global unrest could see more cases like it.

stories.title: Hong Kong’s Boyaa Interactive eyes $70M crypto treasury expansion
stories.summary: Boyaa Interactive International is the 23rd-largest Bitcoin treasury and the third-largest in Asia, behind Japan’s Metaplanet and China’s Next Technology Holding.

stories.title: Mark Zuckerberg is building an AI agent to help run Meta
stories.summary: The Meta co-founder is reportedly working on a personal AI agent to bypass management layers as Meta pushes employees to adopt agentic tools.

stories.title: Crypto, stocks fall as oil whipsaws after Iran vows response to Trump threat
stories.summary: Bitcoin and Asian markets dropped on Monday as Iran escalated threats to strike critical infrastructure in the Gulf.

stories.title: Agentic AI commerce may spell the end of internet ads: a16z Crypto
stories.summary: “The internet is civilization’s town square, and the economic contract is now obsolete,” wrote Sam Ragsdale on an a16z Crypto blog on Sunday.

stories.title: Michael Saylor hints at Bitcoin buy as Strategy’s stack slips 10% into the red
stories.summary: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin-holding company Strategy has already purchased more than $2.9 billion worth of the cryptocurrency this month.

stories.title: NYSE exchanges remove options limits on 11 Bitcoin, Ether ETFs
stories.summary: Part of the approved rule changes allows institutions to trade the crypto ETFs as FLEX options, which offer customizable terms like non-standard strike prices and expiration dates.

stories.title: Banks push tokenized deposits as onchain cash race intensifies: Report
stories.summary: UK Finance said that tokenized deposits could play a “vital role” in a future multi-money system alongside other digital assets.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
